reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this and so did my little sister

I am now terrified of squares.

Being serious this is a great game you should definitely check out since the game looks so good the story fits well and it somehow made me jump by showing a square (multiple times)

This game will be getting updates (as it says in the lobby) they said they would be adding multiplayer and an anomaly game mode!

There will also be several levels but for now only level 1 is available on the demo

Download it NOW. And leave a review!

Scared by Squares on is a unique and incredibly atmospheric experience. The stark black and white presentation feels straight out of The Twilight Zone, giving it a really bold and memorable style. While it could use an optimization pass for smoother performance, the core vision is already striking, and it’s well on its way to becoming something truly special. Well worth your time to play this generous demo.
I love this game a lot and if you have any keys to get the game free at lunch, could I possibly get one, it would be my dream to get this game for free, I love it so much. It's a work of art you made
I played the demo and it was terrifying at first I ain't think it's going to be scary  it's Gary can't wait to the full version come out I recommend this
Haven’t tried it yet but really excited to! Can’t wait to make some content off of it in my tiktok!:)

developer_response.body: I hope you enjoy it and I can not wait to see the TikTok's :)

reviews.review_description: An exploratory experience with some great platforming/dodge simulator puzzles. Can't wait to see what happens as more content is added.
Probably one of the most visually unique and creative games I've played, looking forward to the full game.

reviews.review_title: Didn't Expect This Game To Be This Good!
reviews.review_description:
Just played the Scared by Squares VR demo on the Meta Quest 3, and wow — this horror adventure totally caught me off guard 😱🔥

Creepy atmosphere, mysterious story, and and epic exploration - you NEED to see this!

👉 Watch the full gameplay here: https://youtu.be/x7egCjjAKsE

Very cool concept. I am looking forward to more levels. 
The only issues so far are that when I fell off a path, I kept falling and had to restart the game. Also, respawn puts me right back to the beginning of the level. 
It would be cool if the interactive walls had a bit more of a puzzle to get through them like the very first one.

This game is amazing. The graphics are crazy, the gameplay is amazing, and it didn’t lie about the title. This game is so original and I haven’t played a good horror game in a long time and this is just that. Can’t wait for the full game to come out!

developer_response.body: Super happy to hear you enjoyed the first level! Can not wait for you to see what is in floor 2 :)

reviews.review_description: This is one of the best Virtual Reality games i have player in a while it has good sound design, its visually pleasing and its fun and scary! Can't wait for the release! :D

reviews.review_title: Whould pay 20 for the full game
reviews.review_description: Game is amazing a very different take on horror it’s sorta like the back rooms level that never got explored I felt so alone but not alone I could feel them watching me I was like I wonder if this is all a simulation very good keep up the good work

Dis good





i watch your youtube shorts
I love how creepy this game is it makes me feel like I'm in the back of a trampoline park and the walls and floors are made by foam cubes
I didn't know squares could be scary.. but yes. I am scared of squares now.
